narrative:
Strongsville-04-F (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,162 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
